name: eslint-wrap: eslint_options object from rule.detector_config is forwarded as the second arg of ESLint config { rules:{<rule>:["error", <options>]} }
command: mkdir -p src && printf "import {useEffect} from \"react\";\nfunction X(){useEffect(()=>{},[])}\n" > src/x.tsx && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/wrap-eslint.sh" --rule-id g-react-002 --eslint-rule react-hooks/exhaustive-deps --eslint-plugin-npm eslint-plugin-react-hooks --eslint-plugin-version 4.6.0 --eslint-options '{"additionalHooks":"useCustom"}' --paths "src/**/*.tsx" --trace-config 2>out.txt && grep -E "additionalHooks.*useCustom" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
